name: owndll

metadata.name: owndll
metadata.summary: Download social media content using telegram bot

documentation:
# Telegrambot

Python script for download instagram file and send to telegram channel

### First create the .env file

```text
BOT_API_KEY = <BOT_API_KEY>
BOT_NAME = <BOT_NAME>
GROUP_CHANNEL_NAME = <ANY_GROUP_ID>
BOT_CHANNEL_NAME = <BOT_CHANNEL_ID>
ALLOWED_SITES = "["instagram", "youtube"]"
APACHE_SERVER = "http://localhost"
USERNAME="insta_username"
APIFY_TOKEN="apify_api_jbSY9WYQJeM2KKUjNC47x0if"
APIFY_ACTOR="shu8hvrEb9W"
RAPID_API_KEY="ae461fd870msh4715cecjsn00336fcfbecc"
```

To extract env file -> Use password S***1727!

### How to get chat id

Refer this link to get the chat id https://medium.com/@2mau/how-to-get-a-chat-id-in-telegram-1861a33ca1de

Also refer this https://gist.github.com/nafiesl/4ad622f344cd1dc3bb1ecbe468ff9f8a

Send self message in bot channel to get bot channel id.

### How to run

Recommended python version 3.11.x. Create virtualenv and install the packages.

```shell
python -m venv venv
```

```shell
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

#### Using the terminal

```shell
python manage.py dl [urls] <option>
```

| Option        | Description                                       |
|---------------|---------------------------------------------------|
| -m, --message | Send message to group. Will send message to group |
| -g, --group   | Send message and video or image to public group   |
| -h, --help    | show this help message and exit                   |
| url           | Download one or more video in same time           |

#### Using app

Application will detect copy text from the clipboard.

```shell
python manage.py -c
```

#### Using server

- Start the server

```shell
python manage.py server
```

- Use can access via

```text
http://localhost:8081
```

- Get files

```text
Method   - POST
URL      - /
PAYLoad  - {"url": "https://youtube.com/watch=assfsfs", "vpn": false}
Response - [{"file": "media/dsadasdsa.mp4"}]
```

### CDN server

Need to create first cdn server. Edit nginx.conf when you need.

##### For docker(Recommented):-

```apache
server {
  listen 80;
  server_name _;

  location /media/ {
    alias /app/media/;
  }

  location / {
    proxy_http_version 1.1;
    proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
    proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';
    proxy_cache_bypass $http_upgrade;
  }
}
```

1. Go to cdn folder inside.

```shell
cd cdn
```

2. Build image

```shell
docker build -t mediaserver .
```

3. Go to root folder inside.

```shell
cd ..
```

4. Run docker

```shell
docker run -d -p 80:80 --name media -v ${PWD}/src/media:/app/media mediaserver
```

### Bot server

It will poll the message from group, subgroup, private and channel. It will start download automatically for allowed
sites. For remaining add dll front of url. E.g `dll https://example.com/videolink`.

```shell
(venv) python manage.py -b
```
